items.title_en: Concern for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate as family say health deteriorating

items.title_en: After Spirit collapse, Duffy says there's no need for government budget airline bailout
items.title_zh: 精神航空倒闭后，达菲表示无需政府预算航空公司救助

items.desc_zh: 达菲表示，他认为政府不需要救助那些因高油价而向政府寻求 25 亿美元救助的低成本航空公司。

items.desc_zh: 德国国防部长鲍里斯·皮斯托利斯表示，美国撤军5000人的决定是意料之中的。

items.desc_en: The output increase will remain largely on paper as long as the U.S.-Iran war continues to disrupt Gulf oil supplies.
items.desc_zh: 只要美伊战争继续扰乱海湾石油供应，产量增长将主要停留在纸面上。

items.title_en: Weight loss and hair loss: The growing hair treatment market from GLP-1s
items.title_zh: 减肥和脱发：GLP-1 不断增长的头发治疗市场

items.title_en: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
items.title_zh: 卫生部称，以色列对黎巴嫩南部的袭击造成十三人死亡
items.desc_en: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 尽管停火，以色列和伊朗支持的真主党之间的战斗仍在继续，死者中有四名妇女和一名儿童。

items.title_en: Ex-F1 driver and Paralympic champion Zanardi dies
items.title_zh: 前 F1 车手、残奥会冠军扎纳尔迪去世

items.desc_zh: 前一级方程式赛车手、残奥会冠军亚历克斯·扎纳尔迪 (Alex Zanardi) 去世，享年 59 岁。

items.title_en: 'If we sleep they bite': Rats and weasels infest camps for displaced Gazans
items.title_zh: “如果我们睡觉，它们就会咬人”：老鼠和黄鼠狼出没流离失所的加沙人营地
items.desc_en: In the Gaza Strip, the daily battles are now with rats, weasels, and other pests spreading diseases.
items.desc_zh: 在加沙地带，每天都要与老鼠、黄鼠狼和其他传播疾病的害虫作斗争。

items.title_en: Cuba condemns new US sanctions as 'illegal' and 'abusive'
items.title_zh: 古巴谴责美国新制裁“非法”和“滥用”
items.desc_en: The new measures come on top of a US blockade of oil to Cuba that has caused widespread blackouts and fuel shortages.
items.desc_zh: 这些新措施是在美国对古巴石油封锁导致大范围停电和燃料短缺之后出台的。

items.title_en: Trump claims other presidents flouted war powers law. It's a mixed record
items.title_zh: 特朗普声称其他总统藐视战争权力法。这是一个混合的记录
items.desc_en: Both Bushes and Reagan won authorisation for wars, but Obama and Clinton ducked the requirement.
items.desc_zh: 布什和里根都获得了战争授权，但奥巴马和克林顿回避了这一要求。

items.title_en: US court limits mail-order access to abortion pill mifepristone
items.title_zh: 美国法院限制堕胎药米非司酮的邮购
items.desc_en: The court decision curbs access to the drug used in medication abortions, which is currently the most common method for the procedure in the US.
items.desc_zh: 法院的裁决限制了药物流产中使用的药物的获取，而药物流产是目前美国最常见的手术方法。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.title_en: Who shot a Secret Service officer at the Trump press dinner?
items.title_zh: 谁在特朗普新闻晚宴上枪杀了特勤局官员？
items.desc_en: Court papers do not explicitly accuse the suspect of shooting the officer, even as officials say it was not "friendly fire".
items.desc_zh: 法庭文件没有明确指控嫌疑人开枪射击这名警官，尽管官员们表示这不是“友军开火”。

items.title_en: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
items.title_zh: 好主意？英国公司开创了使用灯柱的数据中心
items.desc_en: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.
items.desc_zh: 太阳能 iLamps 将内置 Nvidia 芯片，但其安全性和可扩展性存在问题。

items.title_en: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。

items.title_en: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
items.title_zh: 特朗普告诉国会停火意味着他不需要他们批准伊朗战争
items.desc_en: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.
items.desc_zh: 总统写道，由于停火，敌对行动“已经终止”，并称他不需要国会授权。

items.title_en: Trump says government gave 'final' bailout proposal for Spirit Airlines as liquidation looms
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，随着清算迫在眉睫，政府向精神航空提出了“最终”救助提案
items.desc_en: Talks with bondholders for a government bailout this week have not yet yielded a deal.
items.desc_zh: 本周与债券持有人就政府救助问题进行的谈判尚未达成协议。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.title_en: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
items.title_zh: Spotify 添加“已验证”徽章以区分人类艺术家和人工智能
items.desc_en: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.
items.desc_zh: 该音乐流媒体平台将审查艺术家的现场日期和社交媒体存在等标准。

items.title_en: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
items.title_zh: 人工智能会带来更准确的民意调查吗？
items.desc_en: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?
items.desc_zh: 使用人工智能收集人们的意见更便宜、更快捷，但它会让民意调查更准确吗？

items.title_en: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
items.title_zh: 苹果公司老板蒂姆·库克离职后称赞 iPhone 需求“非凡”
items.desc_en: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 库克准备在执掌公司 15 年后辞职，将权力移交给约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus)。

items.desc_en: Build an entire business by texting
items.desc_zh: 通过短信建立完整的业务

items.title_en: Twitch streamer hit by car live on camera - 'It felt like slow motion'
items.title_zh: Twitch 主播被车撞到镜头前直播 - “感觉就像慢动作”
items.desc_en: Isaiah Thomas, known as hmblzayy, was walking a 3,000-mile challenge when he was hit
items.desc_zh: 以赛亚·托马斯（Isaiah Thomas，又名 hmblzayy）在进行 3,000 英里挑战时被击中

items.title_en: OpenAI tells ChatGPT models to stop talking about goblins
items.title_zh: OpenAI 告诉 ChatGPT 模型停止谈论妖精
items.desc_en: The AI firm said that unlike previous model bugs, this issue "crept in subtly".
items.desc_zh: 这家人工智能公司表示，与之前的模型错误不同，这个问题“悄然出现”。

items.title_en: Meta in row after workers who say they saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs
items.title_zh: 那些声称看到智能眼镜用户发生性行为的工人失业后，Meta 连续失业
items.desc_en: Meta and its subcontractor disagree over why over 1000 Kenya-based workers were made redundant.
items.desc_zh: Meta 及其分包商对于为何裁员 1000 多名肯尼亚工人存在分歧。

items.title_en: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony
items.title_zh: 马斯克指责 OpenAI 律师试图在好斗的证词中“欺骗”他
items.desc_en: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在审判的第三天就他对萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 和 OpenAI 的诉讼接受了盘问。

items.title_en: Feather

items.desc_en: Photo editor with local AI
items.desc_zh: 具有本地 AI 的照片编辑器

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确
items.desc_en: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。

items.title_zh: 马斯克表示 OpenAI 诉讼中慈善捐赠的基础受到威胁
items.desc_en: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
items.desc_zh: 关于 OpenAI 的历史和公开承诺的案例可能会对人工智能的未来产生重大影响。
